title: More Chests Variants - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Chests for all the Biomes O' Plenty woods

### Adding the much-needed More Chest Variants to [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty). 
Fill your builds with colourful storage now each wood type now has its own chest. Unique designs now to not let the default chest ruin your style.

![](https://github.com/LieOnLion/MCV-BiomesOPlenty/blob/main/Chests.png?raw=true)

### Adding the 13 (1.1.0-beta.1 and above) new chests to Biomes O' Plenty.

With Quad support adding:
- Chests can be burt for fuel in a furnace (excluding nether woods)
- Nether wood chests being immune to fire/lava
- Any chest being usable in vanilla recipes (e.g. Hoppers)

## [Chested Companions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chested-companions) -> To be added <-

Do you want your pets to carry arround little chests? Well now with [Chested Companions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chested-companions) and More Chest Variants support, they can carry chests from your favourite wood type!

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png)

[**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/banners/bisect-banner-spruce-chest.png)**](https://bisect.lieonlion.dev)
